description: A millennium-old pagoda, an important cultural relic protection unit in Nanchang, surrounded by a folk culture street.
Nanchang's traditional commercial pedestrian street, featuring shopping and local snacks.
An important revolutionary memorial hall in China, showcasing the history of the August 1st Uprising and serving as a patriotic education base.
A key university in Jiangxi Province, known for its beautiful campus environment and strong academic atmosphere.
The former residence of late Ming Dynasty painter Zhu Da, a national first-class museum with an elegant garden-style ancient architectural complex.
A natural ecological park in the suburbs of Nanchang, a birdwatching haven with fresh air.
A modern large-scale museum showcasing Jiangxi's history, culture, and archaeological achievements, with a rich collection.
A landmark square in downtown Nanchang, home to the August 1st Uprising Memorial Tower, located in the city's core area.
The largest comprehensive museum in Jiangxi Province, displaying the essence of Ganpo culture and precious historical artifacts.
A historic park in Nanchang's urban area, a popular leisure destination for residents, ideal for family strolls.
